name: Excalibur Transportation Svc
recent_news: No M&A, safety, or growth coverage located. Note: an unrelated 'Excalibur Transportation Service, Inc.' operates in Casselberry, FL; a separate 'Excalibur Limo' (excaliburlimo.us) markets LA luxury transport but cannot be confirmed as the same legal entity.

name: Executive Services & Limo
owner_or_parent: dissolved entity (Executive Services and Limo, Inc., CA #2562521, dissolved 2009-01-16)
recent_news: California Secretary of State records show the corporation 'Executive Services and Limo, Inc.' was incorporated 2003-10-09 and dissolved 2009-01-16. No active successor school-transport entity identified. Whisenant later listed as manager of unrelated Redondo Beach-Voorhees Avenue LLC (real estate).
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in: the corporate entity was dissolved in 2009 and was a limo/consulting shop, not a school-bus operator. Any current activity at the Voorhees Ave address appears unrelated (real estate LLC). Remove from pipeline.
